name: Chiaroscuro (High Contrast)
description: Dramatic contrast between deep shadows and bright light, reminiscent of classical painting and classic film noir.

name: Golden Hour (Natural)
description: Warm, diffused, low-angle natural sunlight with long shadows, occurring shortly after sunrise or before sunset.

name: Neon Noir (Cyberpunk)
description: Moody, highly saturated neon lights reflecting on wet streets with dark, ambient contrast.

name: Low-Key (Atmospheric)
description: Under-exposed style emphasizing shadows, dark tones, and a singular, focused key light for mystery.

name: High-Key (Bright & Clean)
description: Bright, even illumination with minimal shadows, ideal for upbeat, clean, or futuristic sci-fi looks.

name: Rembrandt Lighting (Moody Portrait)
description: Classic 45-degree angle lighting creating a subtle, signature triangle of light on the shadowed cheek.

name: Backlit Silhouette (Dramatic)
description: Strong light source placed directly behind the subject, outlining them in a golden or neon halo.

name: Motivated Practical Lighting
description: Light that appears to originate from elements within the scene, like lamps, candles, or computer screens.
